div1.entryFree: Kindly, adj. in keeping with the quality of a person or thing, natural: by that fatherly and k. power that you have in her, Ado IV, 1, 75. my age is as a lusty winter, frosty, but k. As II, 3, 53 (suited to the season). washing with k. tears his gentle cheeks, H4B IV, 5, 84 (not feigned). the bishop hath a k. gird, H6A III, 1, 131 (well suited to his character and calling). 'tis lack of k. warmth they are not kind, Tim. II, 2, 226. melt Egypt into Nile, and k. creatures turn all to serpents, Ant. II, 5, 78 (such as the land naturally produces).
